requirement_topic.en: Paraguay INTN Conformity Scope for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 巴拉圭INTN电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: 巴拉圭INTN電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: INTN is Paraguay's national technology, standardization, and metrology body and the main official reference point for Paraguayan standards and conformity activity. Paraguay commonly uses or adopts international standards through national standards routes where applicable. For EV chargers, exporters should verify whether INTN, the importer, customs broker, ANDE, project owner, or tender requires IEC 61851, IEC 62196, IEC 61000, Spanish documentation, lab accreditation, or product conformity evidence for the exact charger model. A single official Paraguay EVSE whole-unit mandatory certification rule was not confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; this makes direct confirmation of the current conformity path essential before shipment.
summary.zh: INTN是巴拉圭国家技术、标准化和计量机构，也是巴拉圭标准及合格评定活动的主要官方参考点。巴拉圭在适用时通常通过国家标准路径使用或采纳国际标准。对于电动汽车充电桩，出口商应核实INTN、进口商、报关行、ANDE、项目业主或招标是否要求针对确切充电桩型号提供IEC 61851、IEC 62196、IEC 61000、西班牙语文件、实验室认可或产品合格证据。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认巴拉圭存在单一EVSE整机强制认证规则；因此出货前必须直接确认当前合格评定路径。
summary.zht: INTN是巴拉圭國家技術、標準化和計量機構，也是巴拉圭標準及合格評定活動的主要官方參考點。巴拉圭在適用時通常通過國家標準路徑使用或採納國際標準。對於電動汽車充電樁，出口商應核實INTN、進口商、報關行、ANDE、項目業主或招標是否要求針對確切充電樁型號提供IEC 61851、IEC 62196、IEC 61000、西班牙語文件、實驗室認可或產品合格證據。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認巴拉圭存在單一EVSE整機強制認證規則；因此出貨前必須直接確認當前合格評定路徑。

standards_or_laws: INTN Paraguayan standards and conformity activity
IEC 61851 series — EV conductive charging system safety
IEC 62196 series — EV plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and inlets
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
ANDE project approval and grid-connection requirements

summary.en: China-market charger evidence typically includes GB/T 18487.1-2023 safety and system requirements, GB/T 20234 connector conformity, GB/T 27930 DC communication, Chinese test reports, Chinese manuals and labels, and local grid-operator acceptance. These documents help explain the product but do not establish INTN conformity, ANDE approval, IEC connector interoperability, or Spanish documentation suitability for Paraguay unless explicitly mapped and supplemented.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩证据通常包括GB/T 18487.1-2023安全和系统要求、GB/T 20234接口符合性、GB/T 27930直流通信、中文测试报告、中文手册和标签，以及当地电网运营商验收。这些文件有助于说明产品，但除非明确映射并补充，否则不能证明INTN合格、ANDE批准、IEC接口互操作或适合巴拉圭的西班牙语文件。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁證據通常包括GB/T 18487.1-2023安全和系統要求、GB/T 20234接口符合性、GB/T 27930直流通訊、中文測試報告、中文手冊和標籤，以及當地電網運營商驗收。這些文件有助於說明產品，但除非明確映射並補充，否則不能證明INTN合格、ANDE批准、IEC接口互操作或適合巴拉圭的西班牙語文件。

standards_or_laws: China domestic EVSE test reports, manuals, labels and local grid acceptance

gap.en: The Paraguay market-access file should identify the HS code, importer obligations, INTN conformity expectations, ANDE project path, IEC evidence coverage, Spanish label and manual needs, and whether the charger is AC, DC, private, fleet, or public-network equipment. The absence of a confirmed single EVSE certification rule should not be treated as a waiver; it means the importer and project team must verify the applicable route before purchase order, shipment, and installation.
gap.zh: 巴拉圭市场准入资料包应识别HS编码、进口商义务、INTN合格评定预期、ANDE项目路径、IEC证据覆盖范围、西班牙语标签和手册需求，以及充电桩属于交流、直流、私人、车队还是公共网络设备。未确认存在单一EVSE认证规则不应被视为豁免；这意味着进口商和项目团队必须在采购订单、出货和安装前核实适用路径。
gap.zht: 巴拉圭市場准入資料包應識別HS編碼、進口商義務、INTN合格評定預期、ANDE項目路徑、IEC證據覆蓋範圍、西班牙語標籤和手冊需求，以及充電樁屬於交流、直流、私人、車隊還是公共網絡設備。未確認存在單一EVSE認證規則不應被視為豁免；這意味著進口商和項目團隊必須在採購訂單、出貨和安裝前核實適用路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Conformity route must be verified before shipment; INTN expectations and ANDE project approval can become mandatory gates depending on charger type, importer route, tender and installation context
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic GB/T conformity and grid acceptance are not substitutes for Paraguay INTN, importer, customs, ANDE or project-owner requirements

source.publisher: INTN (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not ship on the assumption that Paraguay has no EV charger compliance gate. Confirm the INTN conformity route, importer obligations, ANDE approval path, IEC evidence, Spanish documentation, and project specification for the exact AC or DC charger model.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假定巴拉圭不存在电动汽车充电桩合规关口即可出货。应针对确切交流或直流充电桩型号确认INTN合格评定路径、进口商义务、ANDE审批路径、IEC证据、西班牙语文件和项目规范。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假定巴拉圭不存在電動汽車充電樁合規關口即可出貨。應針對確切交流或直流充電樁型號確認INTN合格評定路徑、進口商義務、ANDE審批路徑、IEC證據、西班牙語文件和項目規範。

requirement_topic.en: Paraguay EV Market Context — Hydropower Advantage and Developing Charging Network
requirement_topic.zh: 巴拉圭电动汽车市场背景——水电优势及发展中的充电网络
requirement_topic.zht: 巴拉圭電動汽車市場背景——水電優勢及發展中的充電網絡

summary.en: Paraguay's electricity supply is dominated by low-carbon hydropower, including the Itaipu and Yacyreta binational plants, creating a strong decarbonisation argument for EV adoption and very low operational emissions for electric mobility. EV interest and ANDE-supported charging activity are emerging, but the charging market remains developing rather than mature. Procurement opportunities should therefore be treated as project-specific: public, fleet, commercial, and private installations may each define different connector, OCPP, metering, payment, and commissioning requirements.
summary.zh: 巴拉圭电力供应以低碳水电为主，包括伊泰普和亚西雷塔两国联合水电站，这为电动汽车采用提供了强有力的脱碳理由，并使电动出行运行排放很低。电动汽车兴趣和ANDE支持的充电活动正在出现，但充电市场仍处于发展阶段而非成熟阶段。因此，采购机会应按项目处理：公共、车队、商业和私人安装可能分别定义不同的接口、OCPP、计量、支付和调试要求。
summary.zht: 巴拉圭電力供應以低碳水電為主，包括伊泰普和亞西雷塔兩國聯合水電站，這為電動汽車採用提供了強有力的脫碳理由，並使電動出行運行排放很低。電動汽車興趣和ANDE支持的充電活動正在出現，但充電市場仍處於發展階段而非成熟階段。因此，採購機會應按項目處理：公共、車隊、商業和私人安裝可能分別定義不同的接口、OCPP、計量、支付和調試要求。

standards_or_laws: ANDE electricity supply and project connection context
Project-specific EV charger procurement and operation requirements
IEC 61851, IEC 62196 and IEC 61000 as internationally expected technical references

summary.en: China's EV charging market is large and standardised around national GB/T interfaces, GB/T 27930 DC communication, and domestic operator platforms. Paraguay's smaller and developing market does not automatically accept those China domestic assumptions. A China supplier's volume experience can help manufacturing quality and cost, but the shipped configuration still needs Paraguay-specific project validation.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电市场规模大，并围绕国家GB/T接口、GB/T 27930直流通信和国内运营商平台实现标准化。巴拉圭规模较小且处于发展中的市场并不自动接受这些中国国内假设。中国供应商的规模经验有助于制造质量和成本，但出货配置仍需进行巴拉圭项目特定验证。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電市場規模大，並圍繞國家GB/T接口、GB/T 27930直流通訊和國內運營商平台實現標準化。巴拉圭規模較小且處於發展中的市場並不自動接受這些中國國內假設。中國供應商的規模經驗有助於製造質量和成本，但出貨配置仍需進行巴拉圭項目特定驗證。

standards_or_laws: China domestic EV charging network and operator platform requirements

gap.en: Paraguay's hydropower advantage creates real EV policy and procurement interest, but it does not waive conformity, connector, grid, OCPP, or installation duties. Exporters should monitor ANDE and public procurement channels, qualify whether the buyer needs Type 2, CCS2, OCPP, Spanish documentation, and ANDE commissioning support, and budget time for IEC testing and project approval before quoting delivery dates.
gap.zh: 巴拉圭水电优势创造了真实的电动汽车政策和采购兴趣，但并不豁免合格评定、接口、并网、OCPP或安装义务。出口商应关注ANDE和公共采购渠道，确认买方是否需要Type 2、CCS2、OCPP、西班牙语文件和ANDE调试支持，并在报价交期前为IEC测试和项目批准预留时间。
gap.zht: 巴拉圭水電優勢創造了真實的電動汽車政策和採購興趣，但並不豁免合格評定、接口、併網、OCPP或安裝義務。出口商應關注ANDE和公共採購渠道，確認買方是否需要Type 2、CCS2、OCPP、西班牙語文件和ANDE調試支持，並在報價交期前為IEC測試和項目批准預留時間。

mandatory_status.target: Policy and market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical and conformity obligations remain project-specific and must be confirmed with INTN, ANDE, importer and owner
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV charging scale and GB/T ecosystem do not change Paraguay project obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Paraguay's low-carbon hydropower makes EV charging commercially and environmentally attractive, but the market is still developing. Treat each opportunity as a project-specific compliance exercise covering IEC evidence, connectors, ANDE approval, OCPP, Spanish documentation, and commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴拉圭低碳水电使电动汽车充电在商业和环境方面具有吸引力，但市场仍在发展中。应将每个机会视为项目特定合规工作，覆盖IEC证据、接口、ANDE批准、OCPP、西班牙语文件和调试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴拉圭低碳水電使電動汽車充電在商業和環境方面具有吸引力，但市場仍在發展中。應將每個機會視為項目特定合規工作，覆蓋IEC證據、接口、ANDE批准、OCPP、西班牙語文件和調試。
